synthetics.canary.vpcconfig.CfnAbout: If this canary is to test an endpoint in a VPC, this structure contains information about the subnet and security groups of the VPC endpoint. For more information, see [ Running a Canary in a VPC](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatch/latest/monitoring/CloudWatch_Synthetics_Canaries_VPC.html).

synthetics.canary.vpcconfig.SecurityGrou.Description: The IDs of the security groups for this canary.

synthetics.canary.vpcconfig.SubnetIds.Description: The IDs of the subnets where this canary is to run.

synthetics.canary.vpcconfig.VpcId.Description: The ID of the VPC where this canary is to run.
